## Objective

Describe the user or system outcome.

## Scope

- [ ] One concern is addressed
- [ ] No unrelated files are included
- [ ] Architecture or design decisions are documented

## Verification

- [ ] `build-ios-simulator`
- [ ] `unit-tests`
- [ ] `ui-smoke-tests`
- [ ] `firebase-emulator-tests`
- [ ] `secrets-hygiene`
- [ ] `demo-fixture-validation`
- [ ] Light and dark mode reviewed where UI changed
- [ ] Dynamic Type and Reduce Motion reviewed where UI changed

## Evidence

Include commands, screenshots, or logs produced by this change. Do not add fake
metrics, screenshots, or release claims.

## Risk and rollback

State the main risk and the smallest safe rollback.
